title: LTX 2.3 ComfyUI Worker
description: Run LTX 2.3 video inference on ComfyUI with persistent /workspace state

input.name: LTX 2.3 Checkpoint
input.description: Optional startup preload: distilled, dev, distilled-fp8, or dev-fp8

input.name: Persist /workspace
input.description: Store ComfyUI, venv, caches, and downloaded assets on the attached network volume

input.name: Preload Upscalers
input.description: Also preload the official LTX spatial and temporal upscalers into persistent storage

input.name: Hugging Face Token
input.description: Optional token for gated or rate-limited model downloads during startup

input.name: Comfy.org API Key
input.description: Enter your Comfy.org API key to use API Nodes

input.name: S3 Access Key ID
input.description: AWS Access Key ID (if S3 upload is enabled)

input.name: S3 Secret Access Key
input.description: AWS Secret Access Key (if S3 upload is enabled)

input.name: Serve API Locally (dev)
input.description: Dev only: run a local test API

input.name: ComfyUI Log Level
input.description: Log level for ComfyUI (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)

input.name: Websocket Reconnect Attempts
input.description: How many times to retry if the connection drops

input.name: Websocket Reconnect Delay (s)
input.description: Seconds to wait between reconnect attempts

input.name: Refresh Worker
input.description: Restart the worker after each job for a clean state
